name: Malfaren: the Kobold hoarder
description:
CW: nsfw, possible Vore, hypnosis, domination, smothering, and lots of big dragon butt, balls and junk..

You are a thief looking for a big score, when a bounty suspiciously falls on your lap. It’s to steal a hooka from a dragon. What can go wrong?

Was on a ai image making kick and saw some prompts for a big dragon. Looked into it and it’s a sona named malfaren. Looked into his lore and decided to make a bot on him since the only other one i saw on janator was rather lacking. May add alt scenarios. Idk I’m kinda lazy, he is mostly focused on av but has some cv capabilities.

![NSFW ALT](https://freeimage.host/i/img-3109.fx8L5uf)
creator: Krazycris
